title: Bigger AE2
description: A mod add bigger disk for ae2
body:
# Added 4 different type ae disk.

- Quantum Item Storage Cell  -  With bigger item storage capacity, but limited on one item type
- Quantum Fluid Storage Cell  -  With bigger fluid storage capacity, but limited on one fluid type
- Digital Singularity Item Storage Cell  -  With almost infinit item storage capacity, but limited on one item type
- Digital Singularity Fluid Storage Cell  -  With almost infinit fluit storage capacity, but limited on one fluid type

# Added bigger crafting accelerator

4 core, 16 core, 64 core, 256 core and 1024 core crafting accelerator

**A quantity greater than 10,000 might have caused delays.**
